analysis.test: Abrupt termination of an established commercial relationship without a sufficient written notice period […] taking into account the duration of the relationship and the surrounding circumstances — Art. L. 442-1, II C. com. (formerly Art. L. 442-6, I, 5° C. com., as amended by Ord. 2019-359 of April 24, 2019)
analysis.faits: Méridian Studios and Cassiopée […] an established commercial relationship centered on the exploitation of Mistral, documented at least since Purchase Order […] 2 dated July 24, 2018 (Exhibit 7) and the filing of trademark no. 4449595 (Exhibit 2). The mise en demeure (cease-and-desist letter) of September 13, 2021 and the formal letter of October 5, 2021 evidence an abrupt termination, without any written notice of sufficient duration […] having been served on Méridian Studios, notwithstanding that the relationship had subsisted for at least three years and that Cassiopée was invoking an intellectual property right to justify the discontinuation […]
analysis.faille: Absence of documented and continuous evidence of the bilateral commercial relationship between Méridian Studios and Cassiopée (invoices, purchase orders, account statements […] both parties throughout the entire duration of the relationship), and failure to demonstrate explicitly that no written notice of reasonable duration was provided — the mise en demeure (cease-and-desist letter) of September 13, 2021 being susceptible of presentation by Cassiopée as a […]
analysis.riposte: Settled case law (Cass. com., 2 déc. 2008, n°08-10.731 [3]) holds that the […] must be assessed taking into account the duration of the relationship and the degree of economic dependence, and that the invocation of an agreement or a third-party right does not excuse the obligation to provide reasonable notice […]. Méridian Studios will demonstrate: (i) that the commercial relationship surrounding Bastille was established and continuous since at least 2018; (ii) that the mise en demeure (cease-and-desist letter) of September 13, 2021 does not constitute written notice within the meaning of art. L. 442-1, II but rather a threat of termination […]; (iii) that Cassiopée's challenge to intellectual property ownership cannot, standing alone, justify termination without notice […], given that Méridian Studios's ownership of the rights in Bastille is established (trademark no. 4449595, Kbis, Purchase Order […] 2, 2018).

autorites.title: Cass. com. 08-10.731 2008-12-02
themes: relation de dépendance à l'égard de deux sociétés faisant partie d'un même […]
autorites.summary: Fait l'exacte application des dispositions de l'article L. 442-6 I 5° du code de […], l'arrêt […] retient que l'existence d'un accord interprofessionnel ne dispense pas la juridiction d'examiner si le […], […] respecte le délai minimal fixé par cet accord, tient compte de la durée de la relation commerciale établie […] les parties et des autres circonstances de l'espèce

autorites.title: Cass. com. 07-18.050 2008-12-16
autorites.summary:
Toute relation commerciale établie, qu'elle porte sur la fourniture d'un produit ou d'une prestation de […], […] dans le champ d'application de l'article L. 442-6 I 5° du code de […]

Viole dès lors les dispositions de ce texte la cour d'appel, […] retient, pour rejeter une action en responsabilité pour rupture de relations commerciales établies, que les prestations réalisées par un architecte, issues d'une […] purement intellectuelle et exclusive de toute acquisition antérieure en vue de la revendre, constituent une activité par essence civile

analysis.acte_referme: Production of a summary table of bilateral commercial transactions (invoices, purchase orders, account statements — Méridian Studios / Cassiopée) covering the entire duration of the relationship, accompanied by a bailiff's report (procès-verbal de constat) establishing the actual date on which the commercial relationship ceased and confirming the absence of any written notice predating the September–October 2021 correspondence.
analysis.moyen_adverse: Cassiopée contends that the mise en demeure (cease-and-desist letter) of September 13, 2021 and the letter of October 5, 2021 constitute sufficient notice […], and that the termination is justified by Camille Lefèvre's intellectual property rights in Bastille being infringed, which […] eliminates any obligation to provide notice […] or renders the 'established' relationship within the meaning of Art. L. 442-1, II entirely moot.

statut_preuve.pourquoi: The duration and regularity of the commercial relationship are only partially documented (order […] 2 2018, Kbis, trademark). The absence of a framework agreement or a regular stream of invoices […] between Méridian Studios and Cassiopée undermines the demonstration of an 'established relationship' within the meaning of Article L. 442-1, II. Furthermore, the affidavit of certified public accountant Camille Lefèvre 3 (sales variations 2020/2021) supports the damages claim but does not directly prove the absence of […] adequate written notice.

analysis.these_adverse: Cassiopée argues that the commercial relationship was not 'established' within the statutory meaning, for lack of demonstrated stability and regularity, and that the September–October 2021 correspondence constitutes sufficient notice […] having regard to the actual duration of the relationship. Cassiopée further contends that the termination was caused by the infringement of Camille Lefèvre's rights in Bastille, which […] constitutes a legitimate ground excluding or reducing the notice obligation […]. In the absence of any framework agreement (contrat-cadre) placed before the court, Cassiopée contests the very characterization of the relationship as an established commercial relationship.

pieces_adverses.piece: Letter of September 13, 2021 presented as written notice […]
pieces_adverses.contre: This letter is a mise en demeure (cease-and-desist letter) grounded in a dispute over rights, not a notice of termination within the meaning of Art. L. 442-1, II; it specifies neither any notice period […] nor any end date for the relationship

pieces_adverses.piece: Éléments de preuve de la titularité de Camille Lefèvre sur Bastille (contrat de cession, attestations)
pieces_adverses.contre: The intellectual property dispute is the subject matter of the principal claim; absent a final judicial determination, it cannot justify an abrupt termination […] without notice

pieces_adverses.piece: Relevés de commandes ou factures démontrant l'irrégularité ou la brièveté de la relation commerciale
pieces_adverses.contre: Purchase Order […] 2 dated July 24, 2018 and the documented Amazon sales (Exhibit 6 Bis) establish a continuous relationship since at least 2018, contradicting any allegation of irregularity.

pieces_attendues: Summary table of Méridian Studios / Cassiopée invoices and purchase orders (2018–2021)
Bailiff's report (procès-verbal de constat) establishing the actual date of cessation of commercial relations and the absence of any prior written notice
Expert-accountant attestation from Camille Lefèvre 3 regarding Méridian Studios's economic dependence on Bastille / Cassiopée.
Correspondence (emails, letters) […] between Méridian Studios and Cassiopée predating September 2021 attesting to the continuity of the relationship.
